asset_groups.name: Wave graphic colorway variants
asset_groups.semantics: Two approved wave colorway families (Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each available in long and short variants; use approved color values only.

assets.description: Branded orange/yellow gradient PNG used as the full-width Gradient Callout CTA section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning 600px; solid Sunshine #faa31b fallback fill. Do not re-host or recolor.

quotes: asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px)

assets.description: Gold chevron arrow glyph (›, ❯) placed after the CTA button label at 24px, color Gold #FFC20E.

quotes: with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces

assets.description: White rounded-square icon badge (80px, inner line icon ~48px, Brand Blue stroke) that straddles the icon-callout box's left edge, mirroring the accent shape (border-radius 20px 4px 20px 4px) with a subtle Dark Navy drop shadow.

quotes: a **White `#ffffff` rounded square** holding the line icon (Brand Blue stroke)
The white badge **mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale**, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`
the white icon badge **must carry a subtle drop shadow**

assets.description: LISRAYA logo mark; the logo icon maintains 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a in all instances, including when used as a pattern/graphic. Placed at the lightest end of the masthead gradient for contrast.

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).
the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic device in the Sunshine/Gold colorway (Gold top layer at 70% transparency over Sunshine base), available in long and short variants.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic device in the Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorway (Sky Blue top layer at 70% transparency over Deep Blue base), available in long and short variants.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Masthead gradient (Sunshine → light gold ≈#ffe05c) used to hold copy in masthead positions and paired with the logo mark placed at the lightest end for contrast; runs horizontally dark/saturated → light.

quotes: **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

assets.description: Brand Accent Shape core container device: a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii (large radius on one diagonal pair, slight 6px radius on the other). Houses callout text and photography as asymmetric rounded-corner crops.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

assets.description: Warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery — real moments of simple everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Housed in the Accent shape. Requires descriptive alt text.

quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ).
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5)

assets.description: Minimal line illustration icon set — consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds, minimum render size 32×32px in email.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall.
minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds

assets.description: Approved CTA shape/treatment SVG: asymmetric rounded rectangle filled with a linear gradient from #FFDF55 (light gold) to #FAA21B (dark orange).

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
<stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/>

subtypes.best_for: Self-contained assembled email section at 600px with its own top/bottom padding and declared background color for zero-gap stacking.

quotes: Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.

subtypes.name: Email / Modular Section Block

subtypes.best_for: Locked components inserted by the core team carrying Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code, Indication, and ISI.

quotes: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team

subtypes.name: Email / Locked Header, Footer & ISI
subtypes.notes: Header/footer/ISI are inserted by the core team; sections must never reproduce these elements.

templates.body: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

quotes: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

templates.description: Full-width banner where a headline and a single button are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked. Approved MJML block with signature asymmetric button radius.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;`

templates.name: Gradient Callout CTA Section
templates.notes: Signature button radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px is mandatory on every instance, even when the background image is skipped.

templates.body: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

templates.description: A light-blue accent-shape box containing a short blue headline, with a white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge (50/50 over blue and page background). Approved MJML block used for supporting proof-point statements.

quotes: A **light-blue accent-shape box** containing a short blue headline, with a **white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge**
Used for supporting "proof point" statements (dosing convenience, time-to-effect, etc.).

templates.name: Icon Callout Box Section
templates.notes: Outlook (Word engine) ignores position:absolute; badge drops to top-left. Brand-safe option is a pre-composited transparent PNG badge.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
